zh.lifeSummary: Eustachia Saye是Theodore de Saye的女兒，於大約1107年出生在英國英格蘭賀福爾利哈達斯 卡素。她於1128年與Hugh FitzOsbern在英國賀福爾理查茲 卡素結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。她去世於1190年在她的家鄉享年84歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Eustachia Saye是Theodore de Saye的女儿，于大约1107年出生在英国英格兰賀福爾利哈達斯 卡素。她于1128年与Hugh FitzOsbern在英国賀福爾理查茲 卡素结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。她去世于1190年在她的家乡享年84岁。

nameMeanings.name: Saye
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of Slovenian Saje: nickname for someone with very dark, sooty hair, derived from the root of sajast ‘sooty’, or directly from saja ‘soot’.
West African (Liberia): from the personal name Saye, found among the Mano (Mah) people, denoting a first-born boy.

variants.name: Say
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Sai in Orne or Say in Indre, France, perhaps so called from a Gaulish personal name Saius + the Latin locative suffix -acum (see also French name 3 below).

English: nickname, perhaps for someone who made or sold say, a type of woollen cloth, or for an habitual wearer of clothes made of this material, from Middle English sai(e) ‘say’ (Old French saie, from Latin saga, plural of sagum ‘military cloak’). See also Sayer .

French (southern): topographic name from saix (from Latin saxum) ‘rock’, or a habitational name from a place called with this word, for example, Say in Loire, Saix in Tarn and Vienne, Le Saix in Hautes-Alpes, or Les Saix in Isère.

nameMeanings.name: Eustachia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: Eustachia Saye was born about 1107, in Richard's Castle, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Theodore de Saye. She married Hugh FitzOsbern in 1128, in Richards Castle, Herefordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. She died in 1190, in her hometown, at the age of 84.

fr.lifeSummary: Eustachia Saye est née environ 1107, à Richard's Castle, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de Theodore de Saye. Elle a épousé Hugh FitzOsbern en 1128, à Richards Castle, Herefordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Elle est décédée en 1190, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 84 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Eustachia Sayeは約1107年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアリチャード'ス カストルでTheodore de Sayeの娘として生まれた。1128年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアリチャーズ カストルでHugh FitzOsbernと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼女は1190年に故郷で84歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Eustachia Saye(은)는 대략 1107년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 리처드'스 카스틀에서 Theodore de Saye의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1128년 영국 허퍼드실르 리처스 카스틀에서 Hugh FitzOsbern(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1190년 그녀의 고향에서 84세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Eustachia Saye родилась около 1107 г. в местности ричард'с кастл, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания. Её отца звали Theodore de Saye. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugh FitzOsbern в 1128 г. в местности ричардс кастл, хирефордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Она умерла в 1190 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 84 лет.
